query: Spain LOIA AI governance bill Proyecto de Ley Orgánica buen uso gobernanza inteligencia artificial expediente 121/000096 enmienda a la totalidad status BOCG July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on expediente 121/000096:

**Core finding:** As of mid-July 2026, **no enmienda a la totalidad has been registered or published in the BOCG** against Spain's AI governance bill (LOIA), according to all publicly indexed sources.

**Key points:**
- The only BOCG publication for this expediente is **Serie A núm. 97-1 (12/06/2026)** — the bill text itself. No subsequent publication containing enmiendas a la totalidad has appeared.
- The original amendment deadline was **30 June 2026 at 18:00**; per your context it was extended to **2 September 2026**, meaning the amendment window remains **open**.
- Because the window is still open, an absence of any published enmienda a la totalidad at this point is **procedurally normal** — such amendments are typically published in the BOCG only after the deadline closes.
- No parliamentary group (PP, Vox, Junts, etc.) has been reported to have announced or filed one.

**Important source caveat:** The Congreso's official tramitación page (which itemizes each ampliación de plazo) returned HTTP 403 and couldn't be directly retrieved. The publicly cached ControlCongreso tracker reflects a 12/06/2026 snapshot and still shows the original 30 June deadline — it has not been refreshed to display the extension. So the "2 September 2026" date rests on your provided context plus consistency with the original deadline, rather than an independently retrieved published record. This is the main gap; direct confirmation would require accessing the live Congreso initiative page or the BOCG amendment index.
